channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Another New ‘Lord of the Rings’ Movie Is in the Works
item.description: 'Shadow of the Past' will see Tolkien superfan Stephen Colbert join forces with the architects of the 'Lord of the Rings' movie saga.

item.title: I asked ChatGPT to grade my interview answers — it was more useful than real interviews
item.description: ChatGPT can simulate and critique a job interview.

item.title: Hurdle hints and answers for March 25, 2026
item.description: Hints and answers to today's Hurdle all in one place.

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for March 25, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for March 25, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for March 25, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1740 on March 25 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.
